caption_text: I’ve been hanging out with @stevemartinreally too much hence the song choice ☀️🌻

48 shades. 48 stories. One community. 🤎

For our True to Myself Natural Matte Longwear Foundation, we brought together 48 women from across the Latin American diaspora, each representing a shade and bringing their own culture, identity, memories, and lived experiences into this @rarebeauty campaign.

Seeing everyone together honestly made me emotional. It was such a beautiful reminder that our community is not one story, one shade, or one definition of beauty. We’re layered, diverse, real, and deserving of being seen in our own skin. Every story belongs.

Love you all. Thank you to everyone who brought this to life @ultabeauty @bravocado._

user.full_name: D E S I • P E R K I N S

caption_text: This man who doesn’t have social media is truly outstandingly witty, smart and has given the most wonderful attributes to our world of comedy. Some may not know much  that follow me. But Martin Short is nothing short of a legend. His outlook on life is simply joyful. I cried, laughed and empathized his entire story. Check it out on @netflix now please. Worth every minute. 🎬📽️🥲 -thank you Marty for your inspiring and tremendous heart that makes me forever happy.

Every year when we put this report together, I’m reminded of why I started @RareBeauty.
 I’m proud to share the 2025 Rare Beauty Social Impact Report is live! It’s a reflection of what we’ve built together. Through our community, the Rare Impact Fund, and everyone who believes in our mission. Mental health and self-acceptance will always be at the heart of everything we do. 
Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for making it possible. We couldn’t do this without each of you. 
 Link in bio🩷

Primes, covers, and sets all in one.

My team and I at @rarebeauty have been working on this 3-in-1 natural matte foundation for years to make getting ready easier. It’s super lightweight, lasts all day, and honestly looks even better the longer you wear it. I love using it with our new Soft Touch Makeup Blending Sponge.

You can try the new True to Myself Natural Matte Longwear Foundation (available in 48 shades!) at @sephora and rarebeauty.com
@ultabeauty afternoon 🧡 (i accidentally deleted the post smh)
Matte foundation. 3 in 1. Primes, covers and sets. 48 shades!!!! @rarebeauty ♥️ April 2nd at @sephora

From my wedding to the Sunset Blvd music video, to red carpets, and even quiet days at home…I’ve been wearing my new @RareBeauty foundation through it all. It self-primes, self-sets, and looks better as the day goes on.

I’ve waited a long time to share it with you, and I’m SO excited I finally can. 

True to Myself Natural Matte Longwear Foundation in 48 shades (!!!) is available April 2 only at @sephora and rarebeauty.com. Or get it early on the Sephora app April 1.
